text: AI is now creating art, music, and writing. Some paintings made by AI are being sold for high prices, and musicians use AI to compose pieces, even complete songs. Writers also experiment with AI tools that can generate short stories or poems based on simple prompts. However, this raises a question: is this truly creativity? Human creativity comes from emotion, personal experiences, and intentional choices. An AI only learns from existing data and mimics patterns. While AI can produce impressive results, it does not feel or understand what it creates. Many people argue that AI is a powerful tool to support human artists, but it cannot replace the spark of genuine human imagination and expression.
